sprint.goal: AG Studio Portfolio Framework + First Asset — define asset template, scoring system, governance rules; research Guitar Jam Partner architecture; propose 10 highest-ROI starter projects

assignments.studio-sr: Research AG Studio asset template: governance (kernel+policies), telemetry, CI/CD, landing page, analytics hook; draft portfolio scoring system (usage, revenue, strategic value, maintenance cost, demo value)
assignments.studio-qa: Validate portfolio governance rules: max 3 new projects/month, max 20 active, monthly prune scoring criteria
assignments.workspace-config-validator: Ensure schedule.json schema is consistent across all 10 squads
assignments.workspace-agent-reliability: Track agent success rates across last 24h, flag any agents with >20% failure

blockers.description: Claude API daily quota exhausted ~02:45 UTC 2026-03-27 — affected 29 agents including all studio squad members (studio-em, studio-sr, studio-qa, studio-jr, studio-designer). All studio agents STALE (9h+). Quota resets 11:00 UTC daily.
blockers.action: Escalate to human: increase Claude API quota or spread agent schedules to avoid morning pile-up

prs.title: fix: use dynamic workspace path in run-studio-agent.sh
docs: sync org chart for ShellForge Go rewrite
